basic_details.job_title: NIAB Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (NIAB) has officially announced the Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on 2026 at niab.org.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 50 years and hold a BSc degree or a 3-year Diploma in Engineering and Technology can now submit their online applications from 2026 to 01 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: BSc/03-year diploma in Engineering and Technology
qualification.details: BSc/03-year diploma in Engineering and Technology. Preference to Master's degree holders with research experience in genomics projects and publications.

salary_details.details: Rs. 20,000/- + HRA (if applicable) as per DST guidelines Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIAB Field Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIAB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIAB Field Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIAB Field Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Field Assistant post at NIAB is 01 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Field Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a BSc degree or a 03-year diploma in Engineering and Technology. Master's degree holders with relevant research experience are preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Field Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Field Assistant position is 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the NIAB Field Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month, plus HRA if applicable, as per DST guidelines.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Field Assistant post at the National Institute of Animal Biotechnology.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the NIAB Field Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official NIAB website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Field Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Field Assistant position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIAB located?
faq.answer: NIAB is located in Hyderabad, Telangana, with the pincode 500032.
